query:
SELECT 
  n.id,
  n.type,
  n.title,
  n.message,
  n.isRead,
  n.createdAt,
  u.name as user_name
FROM notifications n
JOIN users u ON n.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name = 'Decio Toste 2'
ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
